vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on passwd File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/passwd, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0644 /etc/passwd

triage_decision.reason: Adjusting /etc/passwd permissions to 0644 is a standard STIG requirement and does not affect system boot, networking, or critical services. The change is low‑risk and unlikely to cause lockout.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Incorrect current permissions could expose user information; Applying the chmod to the wrong file could impact system functionality
